justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's preferred time of 'around 2 PM' and the specified days throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering alternative slots.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked if the user wanted to check other times on the same day or a different day, which became slightly redundant after multiple rejections.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was workable but became tiring due to the agent's repetitive responses when no slots were found, leading to multiple apologies from the agent.
